titles.en: Chapter on Judging by the Testimony of Two Women and the Oath of the Claimant
Chapter on Judging by the Testimony of Two Women and the Oath of the Claimant

segments: : "إِذَا شَهِدَ لِطَالِبِ اَلْحَقِّ اِمْرَأَتَانِ وَ يَمِينَهُ فَهُوَ جَائِزٌ".
arabic.text: : "إِذَا شَهِدَ لِطَالِبِ اَلْحَقِّ اِمْرَأَتَانِ وَ يَمِينَهُ فَهُوَ جَائِزٌ".

segments: Hadith.3320 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated that Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), said: "If two women testify in favor of the claimant along with his oath, it is permissible."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.3320 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated that Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), said: "If two women testify in favor of the claimant along with his oath, it is permissible."

narratorChain.raw: 3320 - رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ أَنَّ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

parts.text: 3320 - رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ أَنَّ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Judging by the Testimony of Two Women and the Oath of the Claimant

segments: اَلدَّيْنِ يَحْلِفُ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّ حَقَّهُ لَحَقٌّ".
arabic.text: اَلدَّيْنِ يَحْلِفُ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّ حَقَّهُ لَحَقٌّ".

segments:
Hadith.3321 - Hammad narrated from al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), that:
"The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, permitted the testimony of women along with the oath of the claimant in matters of debt, where he swears by Allah (swt) that his claim is true."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3321 - Hammad narrated from al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), that:
"The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, permitted the testimony of women along with the oath of the claimant in matters of debt, where he swears by Allah (swt) that his claim is true."

narratorChain.raw: 3321 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَجَازَ شَهَادَةَ اَلنِّسَاءِ مَعَ يَمِينِ اَلطَّالِبِ فِي

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
آلِهِ أَجَازَ شَهَادَةَ اَلنِّسَاءِ مَعَ يَمِينِ اَلطَّالِبِ
